# Questions, Vocabulary, and Activities

When Diffit generates a reading passage, it doesn't stop there. It automatically creates a full set of companion resources that are ready to use or customize.

**Time to complete:** ~8 min

---

## Auto-generated resources

For every reading passage, Diffit creates:

### Comprehension questions

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **Multiple choice** | Standard recall and comprehension questions |
| **Short answer** | Students write brief responses |
| **Open-ended / essay** | Higher-order thinking prompts |
| **True/False** | Quick factual checks |

You can adjust the **DOK (Depth of Knowledge) level** of questions to match your assessment goals.

### Vocabulary list

Diffit automatically pulls **key vocabulary** from the passage and provides:

- Definitions appropriate to the reading level
- Example sentences showing the word in context
- The vocabulary list can be exported separately as a study tool

### Summary

A concise overview of the passage's main ideas — useful as a reference sheet or study aid.

---

## Activities and worksheets

Diffit offers pre-built, adjustable activity templates:

| Activity | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| **3-2-1 Summary** | 3 things learned, 2 questions, 1 connection |
| **Graphic organizers** | Cause/effect, compare/contrast, main idea/details |
| **Vocabulary matching** | Drag-and-drop or match term to definition |
| **Discussion prompts** | Conversation starters based on the passage |

Select the activities you want, and Diffit packages them with the reading.

---

## Customizing generated content

You're not locked into what Diffit creates. You can:

- **Edit any question** — reword, adjust answer choices, or change difficulty
- **Remove questions** that don't fit your goals
- **Add your own questions** alongside the generated ones
- **Adjust vocabulary** — add or remove words from the list
- **Change reading level** and regenerate if the first version isn't quite right

!!! tip "Mix Diffit with your own materials"
    Diffit works best when you combine its generated content with your existing resources. Use Diffit for the differentiated passage and vocabulary, then add your own discussion questions or activity that ties to your specific lesson.
